function progressLoop(address contractAddress, bytes calldata progressWithData) external
function maxGasFor(address userAddress) public view returns (uint256)
function hasRole(bytes32 role, address account) public view returns (bool)
event AutoLoopProgressed(address indexed autoLoopCompatibleContract, uint256 indexed timeStamp, address controller, uint256 gasUsed, uint256 gasPrice, uint256 gasCost, uint256 fee)
